questions.sentence: Agile is a iterative approach to software development and project management that helps teams deliver value to their customers faster
One of the most popular Agile frameworks is Scrum
In Scrum work is broken down into small units called Sprints usually lasting two to four weeks
During the Sprint Planning meeting the team decides which tasks to complete
By the end of each sprint the goal is to have a potentially shippable product increment
This allows the team to be flexible and respond quickly to changes or user feedback
